questions.text: Which of these is a natural fibre?
questions.explanation: Cotton is a natural fibre obtained from cotton plants. Nylon, polyester, and acrylic are synthetic fibres.
Silk is a natural fibre obtained from the cocoons of silkworms. This process is called sericulture.

questions.correctAnswer: Spinning is the process of converting fibres into yarn or thread.
questions.explanation: Spinning involves twisting fibres together to form a continuous thread or yarn that can be woven into fabric.

questions.text: The process of making fabric from yarn is called ________.
questions.explanation: Weaving is the process of interlacing two sets of yarn (warp and weft) to make fabric.
